scope: VULCA Solution Pack v1 master PDF pages 7-12 component preview
external_use_boundary: Do not use raw source crops in an external PDF unless cleared.
Redraw, mask, or crop annotated-safe before external use.
Do not include raw local paths, filenames, capture-batch ids, or source-log filenames in customer-facing copy.
Named companies are public market examples only, not customer relationships or audit targets.
confirmed_review_decisions: Keep PROYA as the Lane A public market example.
Use neutral field-completion and owner-route language on customer-visible evidence cards instead of severity scoring.
Frame Lane B as Seedream / BytePlus public model context without selecting a specific model version in customer-facing copy.
Move Kling out of the customer-facing Lane B page; retain it only as an internal video/reference reserve.
Keep the Creatify / Alibaba case study as internal reference by default; do not use it as customer-facing visual proof.
Company names may appear only as public examples, never as customers, partners, endorsers, or audit targets.

customer_variant_defaults.default_reader: brand, ecommerce, and AI ad workflow owners
customer_variant_defaults.named_company_rule: Names may appear only as public examples with source-safe visuals and explicit boundary copy.
customer_variant_defaults.story_weighting: Lane C is the clearest before/after customer story; Lane A and Lane B support the same source-backed method across claims and generated assets.
customer_variant_defaults.first_email_posture: Ask for practical feedback on the sample pack first; bounded pilot discussion is a follow-on step.
customer_variant_defaults.generation_gate: Do not create a separate customer-facing PDF until the user explicitly approves it.

supports: No Skin Drama, Just PROYA campaign context
Advanced Original Repair Series retail/channel context

source_matrix.source_status: Source page identified. Vision Banana compatible fallback mask review completed for internal Page 7/8 proof. Exact downloaded-image URL and capture timestamp still need to be recorded before customer-facing export.
source_matrix.customer_visible_use: Lane A lead visual and Page 8 product-truth evidence-card basis.
source_matrix.external_treatment: Use redrawn or masked crop with source-safe annotation. Do not use raw people, retail, promotion, or local capture details.
must_not_claim: PROYA or Guardian is a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, or authorization source.
VULCA has confirmed claim accuracy, rights ownership, legal approval, or release readiness.
The campaign has a defect or negative finding.

source_matrix.source_status: Source pages identified. Exact image URLs and capture timestamps still need local source-log recording.
source_matrix.customer_visible_use: Small event/source and award/source cue tiles only; not a hero proof point.
source_matrix.external_treatment: Crop, blur, or redraw crowd and trophy details. Keep only source-safe event/award cues needed for the source-record story.
must_not_claim: Attendance, ranking, market leadership, efficacy, or performance beyond the cited source wording.
CBE or award organizers endorse VULCA.
VULCA independently validates the award or event claim.

supports: Seedream 5.0 Lite current public model context

source_matrix.source_status: Current official source pages identified. Lane B field overlay and source-safe distilled card completed. Existing screenshots may contain cookie/feedback overlays and should be refreshed, masked, or redrawn before customer-facing export.
source_matrix.customer_visible_use: Version-neutral AI publishability example: input/source, model/workflow context, output state, label posture, and owner route.
source_matrix.external_treatment: Use clean recapture or redrawn documentation strips. Keep as context around generated assets, not proof of model quality or safety.
must_not_claim: Seedream or BytePlus is a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, or authorization source.
VULCA certifies model quality, safety, copyright clearance, policy compliance, or platform approval.
A specific model version is the final customer-facing recommendation unless explicitly selected later.

source_matrix.source_status: Official workflow source pages identified. Lane C workflow overlay and source-safe handoff card completed. Raw screenshots should remain internal and be converted to redrawn workflow strips or source-safe cards before customer-facing export.
source_matrix.customer_visible_use: Lane C commercial workflow example and Page 12 workflow evidence-card basis.
source_matrix.external_treatment: Redraw the URL-to-video flow and mask faces, product thumbnails, ratings, and vendor UI chrome.
must_not_claim: Creatify is a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, or authorization source.
VULCA predicts ad performance or approves generated ads.
G2 ratings, case-study metrics, or vendor marketing claims are independently verified by VULCA.

source_matrix.source_status: Internal reference only by default. Customer-facing use requires explicit approval and attribution controls.
source_matrix.customer_visible_use: Do not use as visual proof in the default customer page. It may inform the redraw concept only.
source_matrix.external_treatment: Remove from default customer page. If later approved, cite as Creatify-reported public case-study context and mask paired logos/metrics as needed.
must_not_claim: Alibaba is a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, or authorization source.
Creatify-reported case-study metrics are VULCA proof.
VULCA guarantees adoption growth, campaign usage, ROI, CPA, CTR, or ROAS.
